interface: Tunnel0
    Crypto map tag: VPN, local addr 198.51.100.1

   protected vrf: (none)
   local  ident (addr/mask/prot/port): (10.0.0.0/255.255.255.0/0/0)
   remote ident (addr/mask/prot/port): (10.0.1.0/255.255.255.0/0/0)
   current_peer 203.0.113.1 port 500
     PERMIT, flags={origin_is_acl,}
    #pkts encaps: 1234, #pkts encrypt: 1234, #pkts digest: 1234
    #pkts decaps: 1233, #pkts decrypt: 1233, #pkts verify: 1233
     local crypto endpt.: 198.51.100.1, remote crypto endpt.: 203.0.113.1
     plaintext mtu 1438, path mtu 1500, ip mtu 1500
     current outbound spi: 0xAABBCCDD(2864434397)
     PFS (Y/N): N, DH group: none

     inbound esp sas:
      spi: 0x11111111(286331153)
        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
        in use settings ={Tunnel, }

     inbound ah sas:
     inbound pcp sas:

     outbound esp sas:
      spi: 0xAABBCCDD(2864434397)
        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
        in use settings ={Tunnel, }

     outbound ah sas:
     outbound pcp sas:

interface: Tunnel1
    Crypto map tag: VPN, local addr 198.51.100.1

   protected vrf: (none)
   local  ident (addr/mask/prot/port): (10.0.0.0/255.255.255.0/0/0)
   remote ident (addr/mask/prot/port): (10.0.2.0/255.255.255.0/0/0)
   current_peer 203.0.113.2 port 500
     PERMIT, flags={origin_is_acl,}
    #pkts encaps: 5678, #pkts encrypt: 5678, #pkts digest: 5678
    #pkts decaps: 5677, #pkts decrypt: 5677, #pkts verify: 5677
     local crypto endpt.: 198.51.100.1, remote crypto endpt.: 203.0.113.2
     plaintext mtu 1438, path mtu 1500, ip mtu 1500
     current outbound spi: 0xDEADBEEF(3735928559)
     PFS (Y/N): N, DH group: none

     inbound esp sas:
      spi: 0x22222222(572662306)
        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
        in use settings ={Tunnel, }

     inbound ah sas:
     inbound pcp sas:

     outbound esp sas:
      spi: 0xDEADBEEF(3735928559)
        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
        in use settings ={Tunnel, }

     outbound pcp sas:
